# AL-SHA SHAWARMA

> Authentic chicken shawarma, wraps, burgers, broasted chicken, and street food served fresh in Hyderabad, India. Order via WhatsApp, phone, or Swiggy.

AL-SHA SHAWARMA is a halal fast-food shop on Tappachabutra Road, opposite Naseeb Hotel, Hyderabad (500006). Open daily 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM. Phone: +91 90145 65801.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand intro, featured menu, reviews, and ordering options.
- [Menu](/menu): Full menu with shawarma, wraps, burgers, sides, drinks, combos, search, filters, and per-item details.
- [Offers](/offers): Current discounts and combo meal deals.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos of dishes and the shop.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, hours, phone, email, WhatsApp, and Google Maps location.
